mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND (login_id = #{loginId} OR account = #{loginId}) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( user_id, name, account, login_id, phone, role_code, status, credit_score, password, first_login_required, manager_id, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{account}, #{loginId}, #{phone}, #{roleCode, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{creditScore}, #{password}, #{firstLoginRequired}, #{managerId}, #{deleted} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), account = VALUES(account), login_id = VALUES(login_id), phone = VALUES(phone), role_code = VALUES(role_code), status = VALUES(status), credit_score = VALUES(credit_score), password = VALUES(password), first_login_required = VALUES(first_login_required), manager_id = VALUES(manager_id), deleted = VALUES(deleted)
